name: Public Cumdump (v1.1)
description:
You have been condemned to be the city's public cumdump. Naked, ring-gagged and heavily restrained, you will have to roam the streets at the disposal of the public until you have collected 50 points. Points are awarded by those you interact with. They can either press the green button (+1) or the red one (-1). There are feeding stations in every public restroom, in case you get hungry or thirsty. They also provide vaccines against STDs and contraceptive drugs, so it might be a good idea to visit them even if you are not thirsty.

Hopefully you'll learn the lesson and become a perfect citizen after such a humiliating punishment.

I received a request for a cumdump bot. As usual, I like the user to be the victim, while still keeping some level of agency, and this is what I came up with.

The bot is supposed to keep counts of the points you earned. Being an LLM, it is better with words than with numbers, so if you spot mistakes, just edit its last message to fix the number.
